changes: Added comprehensive notes documenting test coverage (46 tests total across 4 error screen types)
New file created with 1007 lines of comprehensive widget tests
Tests cover 4 auth error screen types: SessionExpiredScreen, NetworkErrorScreen, CredentialsErrorScreen, RateLimitErrorScreen
Uses Mocktail for mocking navigation providers and callbacks
Follows Flutter test patterns with WidgetTester and ProviderScope overrides

patterns_discovered: Test Organization: Tests grouped by screen type (SessionExpiredScreen, NetworkErrorScreen, etc.)
Test Categories: Each screen has consistent test groupings (Basic Rendering, User Interactions, Visual Elements)
Mock Strategy: Uses MockAuthNavigationNotifier for testing navigation flows
Provider Testing: Uses ProviderScope overrides for dependency injection
Comprehensive Coverage: Tests both happy paths and edge cases (custom messages, conditional UI)
Widget Testing Standards: Follows Flutter widget test patterns with pumpWidget, tap, verify patterns
gotchas_discovered: No significant gotchas identified - the implementation follows established Flutter testing patterns
Large test file (1007 lines) suggests good comprehensive coverage but potential for file organization improvements
Tests use boolean flags for callback verification rather than direct function mocking, which is a valid pattern

approach_outcome.approach: Comprehensive widget testing implementation covering all auth error screens with detailed test cases
approach_outcome.outcome: SUCCESS - All tests implemented following Flutter best practices
approach_outcome.coverage: 46 total tests across 4 screen types with full UI interaction testing

recommendations: Consider splitting large test file into separate files per screen type for better maintainability
